title: T-041 — Schema amendment: suppliers + supplier_products UX field coverage
prompt:
Amend the existing `suppliers` and `supplier_products` Drizzle schemas (originally created in T-001) to ensure full coverage of fields required by the Supplier UX (PLN-040 list, PLN-041 detail, PLN-042 supplier-product assignment) per `design/04-PLANNING-BASIC-UX.md` Supplier sections.

Required columns must include (audit, validate, ADD ONLY IF MISSING — do NOT recreate columns from T-001):
- suppliers: country CHAR(2) ISO-3166 alpha-2, currency CHAR(3) ISO-4217, email CITEXT (CHECK regex), phone TEXT (E.164 CHECK regex), payment_terms TEXT, lead_time_days INTEGER (>=0), tax_code TEXT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, notes TEXT.
- supplier_products: is_default BOOLEAN, unit_price NUMERIC(14,4), currency CHAR(3), lead_time_days INTEGER NULL (override), notes TEXT.

Introduce a CHECK constraint or trigger to enforce ISO-3166 / ISO-4217 / E.164 formats. Reuse the existing `supplier_products_default_per_product_unique` partial-unique index from T-001 — do NOT duplicate.

Deliverable: amendment file `src/db/schema/planning/suppliers.ts` + new migration `0041_planning_supplier_ux_fields.sql`. Update RED schema-shape test `src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/suppliers.test.ts` to cover the additional columns + format CHECKs.

Do NOT touch unrelated migration files. Do NOT seed data. Do NOT create API or UI in this task.

Close-out: paste migration filename + `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/suppliers.test.ts` output + diff of schema file.

pipeline_inputs.description: Amend suppliers + supplier_products schemas to fully cover Supplier UX fields with ISO format CHECKs.
pipeline_inputs.details: Verify columns from T-001 already cover requirements; add ONLY missing columns + CHECK constraints for ISO-3166 (^[A-Z]{2}$), ISO-4217 (^[A-Z]{3}$), E.164 (^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$). Use citext extension for email column. Reuse existing partial-unique index. Generate migration with `pnpm drizzle-kit generate`.
acceptance_criteria: Given the amended schema is loaded, when introspected, then suppliers exposes country/currency/email/phone/payment_terms/lead_time_days/tax_code/is_active/notes columns.
Given the migration is applied, when an INSERT supplies country='POLAND', then the CHECK constraint rejects with an ISO-3166 violation.
Given the migration is applied, when an INSERT supplies phone='123abc', then the CHECK constraint rejects with an E.164 violation.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/suppliers.test.ts` runs, when implementation is complete, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then 0 errors.
test_strategy: Update RED test to assert new column names + CHECK constraint names appear in generated SQL.
risk_red_lines: Do not drop or recreate the partial-unique index from T-001 — V-PLAN-PO-002 depends on it.
Do not modify other module schemas.
Do not weaken existing FK constraints.
